primary.semantic: Primary brand color. Use for primary buttons, active states, links, icons, navigation indicators. Reserve for purposeful actions only, roughly 10% of the visual surface.

primaryHover.semantic: Primary hover and pressed state for buttons and interactive elements.

app.semantic: Default page background, replaces pure white. Carries roughly 20% of the visual surface, gives the app a calm ambient feel without competing with content.

surface.semantic: Cards, search cards, vehicle cards, feed cards, bottom sheets, modals. Carries roughly 70% of the visual surface.

secondary.semantic: Supporting text, timestamps, descriptions, empty states.

safe.semantic: Indicates a safe status. Should be paired with an icon and label, not relied on for meaning alone.

caution.semantic: Indicates a caution status. Should be paired with an icon and label, not relied on for meaning alone.

warning.semantic: Indicates a warning status, more severe than caution. Should be paired with an icon and label, distinct enough from dangerous to avoid confusion at a glance.

dangerous.semantic: Indicates a dangerous status, the highest severity. Should be paired with an icon and label, and is intended to grab attention immediately.

surface.semantic: White surfaces dominate the interface, keeping it clean and calm.

background.semantic: Very light blue background carries secondary visual weight.

brand.semantic: Royal blue reserved for guiding key actions so safety status colors stand out clearly when they appear.
